turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 86-1836, New York State Club Association versus the City of New York will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: We have filed an opinion in this case affirming the judgment of the Court of Appeals of New York. Our judgment is unanimous. Justice O'Connor has filed a concurring opinion and Justice Kennedy has joined that opinion. Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment.
